outlook_paragraph: CRGY shows elevated drilling activity with 9 active sites at decision date, 4.2 above the recent average, driven by 6 newly active pads—indicating strong operational ramp-up into the target quarter. Despite only 20% exposure to the active segment, the combination of high WTI prices and a solid drilling momentum supports a revenue forecast of $606.8M. The majority of activity is new rather than sustained, suggesting recent capital deployment is beginning to yield production gains.
